text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's, and as I make my way toward a
shrine near the academy, even the winter cold
feels somehow new.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From this year, Admire Vega will be counted
among those in their senior year.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You really think she'll be proud of me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If I keep running and keep winning... Then, when
the day comes that I finally meet her...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: When she finally sees me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do you think she'll be proud?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she lost something of great importance,
she gained a small seed of hope. And I want to
continue to support her as much as I can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue thinking as I get in the line to pray for
success when...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega turns my way. She had been staring
in the shrine's direction but for some reason
refrained from joining the line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gaze then wanders off elsewhere, as if
something's made her nervous.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year...
choice_data_list: Um, let's do our best again this year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a proper, textbook greeting. At least she's
being considerate...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I can't think of anything...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure how long she's been standing there,
but she must be getting cold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to take her somewhere warm so we can
talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the New Year's crowds, we manage to get
a table in a cafe nearby. Only problem is the
inside is just as noisy and bustling as outside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega mutters a few words just barely
audible among the surrounding commotion.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I was thinking, I need to live my life properly.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's what she told me at the end... It's not
about atoning for wrongdoings.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I want to grant her wish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the center of Admire Vega's world sits her
sister. That's never changed since we first met.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I have noticed a few changes these past
two years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not everything she does now is in devotion to her
sister's wish.
choice_data_list:
(She's living her own life, with that wish still
close to her heart.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's why... to live my life properly, I think I have
to start by making a New Year's resolution like
everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But... I can't...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I can't think of anything I want to do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to disappear. Until now, that's all I
wanted.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wanted to dedicate my all to her, until there would be nothing left to give.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Anything less and I wouldn't be doing right by
her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Everything not related to running... I had to ignore everything I ever wanted.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I lived my whole life looking away, ignoring it
all...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And now, I have no idea what to do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be overthinking things. Or
perhaps, this is just the usual Admire Vega having
trouble understanding her own emotions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what I heard, her resolution has already
been made clear.
choice_data_list:
It sounds to me like you want to live. So live
your life to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list:
So how about making that your resolution this
year?

So how about making that your resolution this
year?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You might... be right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we make our way back to the shrine. Even
in the afternoon, the crowd shows no sign of
letting up. The line moves forward at a snail's
pace...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, that might be for the best, at least for
Admire Vega, who walks awkwardly along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, when her turn finally comes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her lead, I close my eyes and clap my
hands together to make my wish. "May this year
see Admire Vega..."

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay, that's done. Time to get back to training.
choice_data_list: You should enjoy a hot meal and rest up!
You should enjoy a hot meal and rest up!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm? I don't have that kind of time—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're right. I'll try... as best as I can.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay, that's done. Time to get back to training.
choice_data_list:
You gotta get stronger and win loads of races
this year!

You gotta get stronger and win loads of races
this year!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're right...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I want to do that. So...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll be counting on you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay, that's done. Time to get back to training.
choice_data_list: And finding something to do to help you relax!
And finding something to do to help you relax!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? Relax?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No. You... you're right.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll think about it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wonder if I can come up with something...
